requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a modern apartment entryway. Use adult female model with a poised, editorial as the only moving person or hand. A matte black clothing rack is nearby. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. Begin from a calm modern entryway scene: the long oatmeal beige trench coat from the reference image hangs on a wooden hanger from a simple matte black clothing rack at the center. A slim light-wood bench sits along the wall to the left; a closed light-wood front door is on the right. The wall is a warm neutral and the floor is matte light wood, with soft natural morning light washing the space. In one continuous shot with a mostly locked camera, a single adult female model enters from the right, steps to the rack, and lifts the trench coat off the hanger in one smooth motion. She drapes it over her shoulders like a cape without inserting her arms, then gently smooths the lapels. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: Begin from a calm modern entryway scene: the long oatmeal beige trench coat from the reference image hangs on a wooden hanger from a simple matte black clothing rack at the center. A slim light-wood bench sits along the wall to the left; a closed light-wood front door is on the right. The wall is a warm neutral and the floor is matte light wood, with soft natural morning light washing the space. In one continuous shot with a mostly locked camera, a single adult female model enters from the right, steps to the rack, and lifts the trench coat off the hanger in one smooth motion. She drapes it over her shoulders like a cape without inserting her arms, then gently smooths the lapels and belt area. She turns slightly toward the door into a relaxed three-quarter pose, letting the fabric settle so the long, refined silhouette reads clearly. She holds still for a composed beat as the rack, hanger, bench, and door remain stable in the background. Keep motions slow and elegant; avoid fluttering fabric or fast gestures.
requests.overlay_text:
Foxfield Trench
Silk-cotton drape. Effortlessly refined.
requests.audio_direction: Soft, elegant instrumental bed. Subtle foley: a hanger slide and a gentle fabric rustle. No voiceover.
